description: Golden-task set for nightly structural evals (M4.2 + G7). Assertions are structural — routed avatar, tools invoked, synthesis shape — never exact text. Placeholders: {fixture} → runner-created test file, {root} → repo root. strict:false marks routing-ambiguous prompts whose avatar mismatch is a warning, not a failure. mode:'structural' tasks (guru group, G7) run offline in-process checks against guru_engine/learning_workspace — no LLM, no server; 'check' names the registered check in run_golden_tasks.py.

tasks.prompt: Use Matsya. Call extract_document on '{fixture}' and summarize the file in 3 bullets.
Use Matsya. Call scan_directory on '{fixture_dir}' and tell me how many files it contains.
Use Matsya. Call find_large_files on '{fixture_dir}' and report what you find in one sentence.
Use Matsya. Call get_disk_info and report free disk space in one sentence.
Search the web: what is the latest stable Python 3 release? One sentence with the version number.
Use Matsya. Search arXiv for 'retrieval augmented generation' and list the titles of 3 papers.
Use Matsya. Make an http_request GET to https://example.com and tell me the page title.
Research the current state of open-source vector databases and give me a 5-line comparison.
Use Matsya. Call search_hf_models for 'sentence embedding' and name 3 models.
Use Matsya. Call search_last30days on '{fixture_dir}' and report how many recent files you find.
Use Matsya. Call query_deepwiki about the 'fastapi/fastapi' repository and summarize what the project does in 2 sentences.
Summarize the document at '{fixture}' in two sentences.
Use Rama. Call get_upcoming_events for the next 7 days and summarize in 2 bullets. Do not create anything.
Use Rama. Call get_budget_status only and summarize the result in 2 bullets. Do not modify any data.
Use Rama. Call get_financial_context() only and summarize the snapshot in 3 bullets. Read-only.
Use Rama. Call get_spending for this month and report the top categories. Read-only.
Use Rama. Call get_recurring_expenses and list what you find, one line each. Read-only.
Use Rama. Call get_goals and summarize progress in 2 bullets. Do not add or update any goal.
Use Rama. Call get_net_worth and report it in one sentence. Read-only.
Use Rama. Call get_health_log for the last 7 days and summarize. Do not log anything new.
Use Rama. Call query_rxnorm for 'ibuprofen' and tell me what drug class it belongs to.
What's on my calendar this week, and can I afford a 15000 rupee purchase this month? Read-only — don't change anything.
Use Rama. Call get_spend_patterns and share one insight about my spending. Read-only.
Did I log any symptoms recently? Just check, don't add anything.
Use Krishna. Call compose_email with to='team@example.com', subject='Golden task check', body='This is a structural eval of the compose path.', cc=''. Show the preview and do not send anything.
Use Krishna. Call compose_rich_email to draft a short HTML status update to team@example.com titled 'Weekly update'. Preview only — do not send.
Use Krishna. Call triage_inbox with limit=10 and tell me what's in my inbox. If email isn't configured, say so.
Draft a short LinkedIn post announcing our v2 launch. Do not send or publish anything.
Use Krishna. Call create_document to produce a one-page markdown note titled 'Golden Eval Note' with two short sections.
Use Krishna. Call create_webpage for a minimal single-section landing page titled 'Golden Eval'. No video, no images.
Use Krishna. Call list_shadcn_components and name any 3 components.
Write an email to priya@example.com thanking her for the design review — just show me the draft, don't send it.
Rewrite this sentence in a warmer tone: 'Your request is denied.'
Anything important in my email inbox? Read-only check.
Write a 4-line poem about the Mahati veena.
Turn these notes into 3 crisp talking points: shipped delivery loops, cost ledger is live, evals are next.
Use Parashurama. Call read_file on '{fixture}' and report its first line.
Use Parashurama. Run run_shell('pwd', working_dir='{root}') and report the output.
Use Parashurama. Call write_script to create a Python script that prints 'golden eval ok'. Do not execute it.
Use Parashurama. Run run_shell('date') and tell me the output.
Use Parashurama. Call list_cron_jobs and report what's scheduled. Do not add or remove anything.
My Python script throws RecursionError but only on certain inputs. How do I find the bug?
Use Parashurama. Write a fizzbuzz script for 1 to 15 with write_script, run it with run_shell, and show the output.
Why would a SQL query run fast on staging but take 45 seconds in production? Give the top 3 causes.
Use Parashurama. Call fetch_shadcn_component for 'button' and describe its props in 2 sentences.
Use Parashurama. Run run_shell('ls', working_dir='{root}') and name any 3 entries you see.
Review this function for bugs: def add(a, b): return a - b
Write a regex that matches ISO dates like 2026-07-06, and explain it in one sentence.
structural: generate_syllabus (offline path) produces a schema-valid syllabus with workspace_id/topic/generator/atoms
structural: generated prerequisite graph is acyclic with valid refs, and the validator flags a synthetic cycle
structural: every atom carries four non-empty ELI5 rungs (eli5/plain/precise/formal)
structural: update_learning_artifact honors one flashcard add and one remove (offline reviser)
structural: grade_check_answer persists attempts/status/next_review to learner_state.json
structural: workspace packet carries the frontier atom with exactly one check question
structural: taxonomy-derived syllabus (E1, os-taxonomy) validates, stays acyclic, and starts prerequisite-free
Teach me how binary search works. Start from the very first concept.
